docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT SUAREZ, DAVID NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY. CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER PRIOR ORDER ON 3/2/05. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
